title: T1 Engine: commit() is idempotent — a missing running/ file must not crash the kernel
prompt: Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T1-17-commit-rename-guard.md move by move. Guard commit()'s os.rename so a missing running/ file (re-run of a done ticket, double-commit, race) skips gracefully instead of crashing the whole orchestrator; on any failure apply the counter-move; on abort write needs-decision/. Run the war game's Verification block yourself before self-reporting.
verify: orchestrator.py parses; committing a non-existent ticket returns cleanly (no traceback); a normal running/->done/ commit still works; reap decision logic (artifact_ok/verify) untouched.
